label: Space & Astronomy
description:
Solar system objects (planets, moons, dwarf planets, comets), notable deep-sky objects, exoplanets, asteroids, and Earth-orbiting satellites. Static data from IAU/JPL/NASA; dynamic data (exoplanets, asteroids, satellites) generated by import scripts from live archives.

Atom IDs: astro:planet:*, astro:moon:*, astro:dwarf_planet:*, astro:comet:*, astro:exoplanet:*, astro:asteroid:*, astro:satellite:*
attribution: NASA/JPL Horizons | NASA Exoplanet Archive | Celestrak SATCAT | IAU Minor Planet Center
